assertions.reason: After the launch attempt failed, the overview no longer exposed the Edit Study control, so the non-draft study was no longer editable from the browser surface.
A draft study visibly exposed Launch Study, opened a launch confirmation dialog, and after confirmation showed “Study launch started.” instead of blocking launch while still draft.
Launching a draft study with no variants did not land in persona_review; the visible study status became failed almost immediately.
The browser flow never reached queued because manual variant generation from the Personas tab failed with “Run budget must be an integer between 50 and 100.”
The study failed before any runs were created, so no queued or running dispatch state was observable from the real UI.
The study never produced initial runs, so replaying was never reached through the browser flow.
The study never reached replaying, so analyzing could not be observed through the browser flow.
The study failed before any analysis/report generation could occur, so completed state was not reachable in user testing.
No runs were created after launch, so queued/running/completed live counts never had a chance to update reactively.
No runs were created after launch, so no live outcome breakdown updates were observable.
No runs entered dispatching or running, so the Active persona variants monitor stayed empty.
The failed launch prevented the study from reaching replaying, so the Replaying state could not be observed.
The failed launch prevented the study from reaching analyzing, so the Analyzing state could not be observed.
The study never completed, so completedAt could not be observed on the user surface.
The Report tab remained a status placeholder and the study never reached completed, so headline metrics and issue cards were not available to validate.
The real study Personas tab showed 0 accepted variants and clicking Generate variants surfaced a server error requiring a run budget between 50 and 100.
The observed lifecycle jumped from draft directly to failed after launch rather than progressing through persona_review, ready, queued, and running.
Because the study failed before creating any runs, no real-time execution updates were observable on overview or runs pages.

frictions: The study creation wizard accepts run budgets below 50, but both launch and manual Generate variants later expose a stricter 50-100 budget requirement.
blockers: The launch flow failed before any runs were created because variant generation rejected the visible run budget of 5.
The Report tab is still a placeholder surface and does not expose completed-study metrics or issue cards.
